[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010001110 5
1 0101100110 5
2 0000010100 2
3 0110010110 5
4 0101010001 4
5 1010101111 7
6 1111111110 9
7 1110100111 7
